device_visibility_correction: At this audit point Samsung R5CY22X6MSB and Xiaomi d948ffd0 are both visible in ADB. The earlier same-day blocker text saying Xiaomi was absent is stale and must not be used as current device-state evidence.

xiaomi_debug_receiver_anr_guard.observed: last_sync_summary=skipped_after_failed_direct_send; no fresh ANR in checked logcat window

physical_relay_stale_target_port.observed: target port stayed 39279 -> 39279 and relay used 39279; forward still timed out

wifi_direct_binding_diagnostics.observed: Samsung: p2p_visible_device_count=2, p2p_service_found_count=0, p2p_txt_record_count=0. Xiaomi: p2p_txt_bound_peer_count=2, relationship_peer_seen_by_transport=true, but TCP connect to Samsung 192.168.49.1:37549 timed out.

wifi_direct_java_server_socket_listener.observed: Xiaomi bound Samsung TXT, selected wifi-direct, and attempted 192.168.49.1:39259; the send still timed out.

wifi_direct_shell_tcp_control.live_evidence: manual adb shell nc control during 2026-06-11 14:20 MSK run
wifi_direct_shell_tcp_control.observed: Xiaomi shell delivered payload kraken to a Samsung shell nc listener on 192.168.49.1:45678; Kraken app UID listener sockets were absent from /proc/net/tcp shortly after debug broadcast completion.

wifi_direct_sender_wait_post_hold_captur.observed: Sender: debug_send_wait_satisfied=false, debug_send_success=false, debug_send_error=UNKNOWN_PEER. Target: post_hold_refresh_wait_sec=93, accepted_connections=0, inbound_packets=0.

tcp_frame_ack_semantics.observed: Direct LAN and Wi-Fi Direct now require LanFrameCodec.readAck before TransportSendResult(true); receiver writes ACK after decode/enqueue.

wifi_direct_fixed_port_fallback.observed: WifiDirectTransport binds DEFAULT_WIFI_DIRECT_PORT=48381 with dynamic fallback if occupied and creates fallback relationship peers from group owner address or single P2P client ARP when DNS-SD/TXT is missing.

wifi_direct_xiaomi_to_samsung_delivery_s.observed: Sender selected wifi-direct and ACK-backed debug_send_success=true to 192.168.49.1:48381; target post-send selected wifi-direct with accepted_connections=1, inbound_packets=1 and relationship_peer_seen_by_transport=true.
wifi_direct_xiaomi_to_samsung_delivery_s.claim_boundary: One foreground-target Xiaomi -> Samsung delivery slice only; not bidirectional reliability, negative tests, or production claim.

wifi_direct_samsung_to_xiaomi_sender_sli.observed: Samsung sender selected wifi-direct, used fallback endpoint 192.168.49.59:48381, and debug_send_success=true with p2p_txt_bound_peer_count=0; paired Xiaomi target artifact was pre-send and does not prove accepted/inbound counters.

debug_wifi_direct_foreground_evidence_mo.observed: Debug receiver can request ACTION_START_DEBUG_WIFI_DIRECT_ONLY through --start-foreground-wifi-direct, gated by BuildConfig.DEBUG.

wifi_direct_reverse_foreground_service_a.observed: Background foreground-service start was denied by Android. Starting after bringing Xiaomi app foreground produced a Wi-Fi Direct listener on 192.168.49.59:48381, but Samsung sender attempts still ended UNKNOWN_PEER or invalid missing files.

open_gates.missing_evidence: Two connected phones on current build, Wi-Fi Direct-only peer discovery, selected_route=wifi-direct, ACK-backed delivery, bidirectional delivery and post-send counters.
open_gates.current_blocker: Improved but still open: fixed-port fallback produced a proven foreground-target Xiaomi -> Samsung slice with target accepted_connections=1 and inbound_packets=1. Samsung -> Xiaomi has one sender-side fallback success, but later foreground-service attempts still failed to produce a valid reverse target-counter proof: UNKNOWN_PEER or missing sender files. Remaining work is reverse route formation plus reliable post-send target counters, then repeated bidirectional evidence.

open_gates.missing_evidence: Unknown peer, wrong recipient, duplicate/replay, TTL and malformed packet rejection captured while Wi-Fi Direct is the active route.
open_gates.current_blocker: Requires a working two-phone Wi-Fi Direct message route first; current Wi-Fi Direct attempt is not message-capable.

open_gates.missing_evidence: Android A -> Mac -> Android B physical LAN forwarding for normal/drop/duplicate/tamper with before/send/relay/after artifacts.
open_gates.current_blocker: Runner now keeps target port stable, but Mac -> Xiaomi normal forwarding still times out and target inbound stays 0.

open_gates.missing_evidence: External malformed, unknown, wrong-recipient and duplicate cases reach LAN/BLE/Wi-Fi Direct phone listeners and increment rejection counters.
N-run two-device route benchmark with min sample gate met for each claimed route and median/p95/loss/retry reported.
open_gates.current_blocker: Current two-device benchmark has zero delivered latency samples and fails the min sample gate.

open_gates.missing_evidence: Android Keystore identity, signed QR, reviewed encrypted packet envelope, release signing and security review.
open_gates.claim_boundary: Production secure messenger remains out of scope for current research demo claims.

research_prototype_closed_gates.claim_boundary: Adamova participates in experimental profile admission policy; it is not production encryption or a production crypto security proof.
Blocks accidental release-like builds while prototype crypto remains; does not implement production security.

claim_boundary: This audit is a current blocker report. It proves that 10/10 is not yet closed; it must not be cited as a completed 10/10 claim.
